signals.description: T. Rowe Price terminated as global equity manager on November 4, 2025; account NAV of ~$2 billion reallocated to cash. This directly answers the search query for NY State CRF manager termination T. Rowe Price.
CVC Capital Partners Globetrotter SCSp $13.42M funded from rollover capital out of CVC Asia Pacific Fund IV, L.P., not new cash commitment.
Stonepeak Global Renewables Fund II Co-Investment ($80M) invests alongside Stonepeak Global Renewables Fund II, L.P. ($243.545M); same GP, same close date.
CVC DIF Management received two separate €250M commitments on same date (Nov 18, 2025): DIF Infrastructure VIII (core) and DIF Value-Add IV (value-add).
All investments confirmed no placement agents used, per Office of the State Comptroller policy.

results.caseName: DCRB — noisy board minutes (should flag weak)

metrics.evidence: No IRR/TVPI/DPI metrics reported in this board meeting document

signals.description: No IRR, TVPI, or DPI metrics are present in this document. The meeting minutes reference a separate IPC/investment performance presentation delivered by CIO Patrick Sahm earlier in the day, which likely contains private markets performance data, but that document was not included in these minutes.
Only total fund net return figures are disclosed: CY2025 14.1%, FY2025 10.25%, FYTD2026 4.3%, 20-year avg +6.6% per annum. No asset-class-level IRR, TVPI, or DPI breakdowns are present.

Three private fund commitments noted: Fund AN (infrastructure, $150M proposed), Quantum Energy Partners IX (natural resources, $100M closed 11/26/2025), Updata Fund VIII (private equity, $100M closed 12/5/2025). Performance metrics not disclosed.
